overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle passes through a security checkpoint, navigates urban intersections, and transitions onto an elevated highway lined with massive digital billboards.

events.description: security barrier opens allowing vehicle to proceed
vehicle accelerates from stop through checkpoint

agents.ego_description: stopped at security checkpoint waiting for barrier to open, then proceeding through gate

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead moving through checkpoint gate

entered.detail: red and white striped barrier arm blocking the road
small booth with red and white panels
large overhead structure with colorful neon lighting
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The vehicle is stopped at a security checkpoint under a neon-lit archway in heavy rain. The barrier opens and the vehicle proceeds forward through the checkpoint toward an intersection.

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection following the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets and turning right at intersection

notable_agents.action: person standing on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass ahead with support columns
tall street lights lining the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through an urban intersection with commercial buildings on both sides, turning right onto a street lined with street lamps. An overpass structure looms ahead as the vehicle approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition with palm tree median

events.description: passing under overpass structure entering highway corridor
emerging from underpass into more open area with palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating on highway following traffic through underpasses

entered.detail: metal guardrails with orange reflective strips
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the road
large red illuminated sign with 2nd amendment text
multiple illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under an overpass structure transitioning onto a multi-lane highway. Palm trees become visible along the median as the vehicle accelerates past digital billboards and commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with massive digital billboards

events.description: passing under massive overhead billboard structure
entering covered tunnel section of highway

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway passing under billboards and through tunnels

notable_agents.action: red vehicle ahead driving on the highway

entered.detail: giant overhead digital screen displaying advertisements
covered section of highway with concrete walls
tall concrete walls with orange railings on top

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along an elevated highway passing under massive digital billboards and through tunnel sections. Concrete noise barriers line both sides of the road as neon advertisements illuminate the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a restricted security zone into the open, neon-lit arteries of a futuristic city. It begins stopped under a glowing archway in heavy rain, proceeding forward as a security barrier lifts to grant passage. As the vehicle clears the checkpoint, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection flanked by towering commercial buildings. The camera then shifts right, gliding down a street lined with street lamps before the environment is dominated by the looming silhouette of an overpass structure ahead.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from an urban overpass onto a high-speed elevated highway drenched in neon light. It begins by passing under a heavy concrete structure, accelerating onto a multi-lane road where palm trees emerge along the median amidst a backdrop of commercial buildings. As the vehicle gains speed, the open cityscape shifts into a more enclosed environment characterized by towering digital billboards and concrete noise barriers. The scene then flows through a series of tunnel sections, where the rainy night is punctuated by the glow of massive advertisements lining the highway.
